landing.hero.subtitle: Upload any document. A million AI agents simulate what happens next. Get a prediction report in minutes — not months.
landing.hero.microtext: No credit card required. First 3 simulations free.
landing.proof.line: Built on OASIS — multi-agent simulation framework presented at NeurIPS 2025 | Powered by GraphRAG knowledge graphs | 5 languages supported
landing.howItWorks.title: Three steps. Any document. A million perspectives.
landing.howItWorks.step1.title: Upload
landing.howItWorks.step1.desc: Drop any document — a business plan, press release, market report, research paper. PDF, MD, or TXT. AgenikPredict extracts real-world entities and builds a knowledge graph automatically.
landing.howItWorks.step2.title: Simulate
landing.howItWorks.step2.desc: Up to a million AI agents — each with unique personality, memory, and behavior — discuss your scenario on simulated social platforms. Watch opinions form, spread, and clash in real time.
landing.howItWorks.step3.title: Decide
landing.howItWorks.step3.desc: Get a detailed prediction report. Then go deeper — chat with any agent, send surveys, or let ReportAgent run attribution analysis with specialized tools.

landing.useCases.title: One platform. Every prediction you need.
landing.useCases.subtitle: From boardroom strategy to personal decisions — simulate before you commit.
landing.useCases.marketing.title: Marketing & PR
landing.useCases.marketing.desc: Test your campaign on a million simulated people before spending a dollar on real ones. Predict public reaction to announcements, launches, or crisis responses.
landing.useCases.investment.title: Investment Analysis
landing.useCases.investment.desc: Upload earnings reports or market research. AI agents simulate how investors, analysts, and the public react — before you commit capital.
landing.useCases.product.title: Product Strategy
landing.useCases.product.desc: Test pricing changes, feature announcements, or pivot decisions. See how your market responds in a parallel world before making irreversible moves.
landing.useCases.hiring.title: Hiring & Team Dynamics
landing.useCases.hiring.desc: Upload a candidate profile or org structure. Simulate how the person fits your team culture or how leadership changes play out.
landing.useCases.political.title: Political & Social Analysis
landing.useCases.political.desc: Model public opinion on policy changes, election scenarios, or social movements. Understand how narratives form and spread across communities.
landing.useCases.risk.title: Risk & Due Diligence
landing.useCases.risk.desc: Background analysis on companies, deals, or partnerships. AI agents surface risks, conflicts, and hidden dynamics that humans miss.
landing.useCases.academic.title: Academic Research
landing.useCases.academic.desc: Simulate social experiments, test hypotheses about group behavior, or model how research findings would be received by different audiences.
landing.useCases.personal.title: Personal Decisions
landing.useCases.personal.desc: Moving to a new city? Changing careers? Starting a business? Let a million perspectives help you see what you might be missing.
landing.features.title: The most transparent AI prediction system ever built.
landing.features.subtitle: Every step is visible. Every agent is real. Every conclusion is traceable.
landing.features.graph.title: Reality Seeds → Knowledge Graph
landing.features.graph.desc: Your documents aren't just read — they're understood. AgenikPredict extracts entities, relationships, and context using GraphRAG, building a living knowledge graph that becomes the foundation of every simulation.
landing.features.personas.title: Not random bots. Real personas.
landing.features.personas.desc: Each agent gets a unique personality, background, MBTI type, social network, memory, and behavioral patterns — all derived from your documents. They think, remember, and evolve.
landing.features.dualPlatform.title: Two worlds. One truth.
landing.features.dualPlatform.desc: Agents interact simultaneously on two simulated platforms — a broadcast feed and a community forum. Different platforms, different dynamics, same underlying reality.
landing.features.interaction.title: Don't just read the report. Interrogate it.
landing.features.interaction.desc: Chat with any agent to understand their reasoning. Send surveys to groups. Use ReportAgent's four specialized tools — InsightForge, PanoramaSearch, QuickSearch, and InterviewSubAgent.
landing.why.title: Why not just use ChatGPT?
landing.why.perspectives.title: A million perspectives, not one
landing.why.perspectives.desc: ChatGPT gives you one AI opinion. AgenikPredict creates a million distinct agents with different backgrounds, biases, and memories — then lets them argue, agree, and surprise you.
landing.why.grounded.title: Grounded in your data
landing.why.grounded.desc: No generic answers. Every simulation is built from YOUR documents — your market data, your press release, your business plan. The knowledge graph ensures nothing is hallucinated from thin air.
landing.why.transparency.title: Full transparency
landing.why.transparency.desc: See exactly how every conclusion was reached. Trace information flow through the knowledge graph. Chat with any agent. Audit any interaction. This isn't a black box — it's a glass box.
landing.why.cost.title: Fraction of the cost
landing.why.cost.desc: Traditional focus groups cost $15,000–$100,000 and take weeks. AgenikPredict delivers a million-agent simulation for about $5 in under 30 minutes.
landing.demo.title: See it in action.
landing.demo.desc: Watch AgenikPredict transform a document into a full multi-agent simulation — from knowledge graph to prediction report in minutes.
landing.pricing.title: Start free. Scale when ready.
landing.pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes the full pipeline — knowledge graph, AI agents, dual-platform simulation, and deep interaction.
landing.pricing.free.name: Explorer
landing.pricing.free.subtitle: For individuals testing the waters

landing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
landing.faq.a1: AgenikPredict simulates a range of possible outcomes based on your data. Think of it as a sophisticated scenario analysis tool — the value is in seeing perspectives and dynamics you wouldn't have considered, not in predicting exact outcomes with certainty.
landing.faq.q2: What types of documents can I upload?
landing.faq.a2: PDF, Markdown (.md), and plain text (.txt) files. We're adding support for more formats including Word documents, spreadsheets, and web URLs.
landing.faq.q3: How is this different from asking ChatGPT?
landing.faq.a3: ChatGPT gives you one AI's opinion. AgenikPredict creates thousands of distinct AI agents — each with unique personality, memory, and social connections — and lets them interact on simulated platforms. You get emergent group dynamics, not a single perspective.
landing.faq.a4: Your documents are processed for the simulation and are not used to train any AI models. Each simulation creates an isolated environment. Enterprise plans offer on-premise deployment for maximum security.
landing.faq.a5: The interface is available in English, Hebrew, Russian, Spanish, and German. Simulations can process documents in any language supported by the underlying LLM.
landing.faq.q6: How long does a simulation take?
landing.faq.a6: A typical simulation with 100 agents takes about 15–30 minutes. Larger simulations with thousands of agents may take longer. You can monitor progress in real time.
landing.finalCta.title: Your next decision could be your best one.
landing.finalCta.subtitle: Stop guessing. Start rehearsing. Upload your first document and see what a million minds think.
landing.footer.tagline: AI Prediction Engine with Multi-Agent Simulation
